who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Difficulty in reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums for procurement tools and tips
try_it: Let users try weekly email reports and manual entry for discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow

Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import feature for existing data
